mapper.sql: room_id, room_code, room_name, description, max_members, current_members, owner_id, status, expire_time, version, password_mode, password_hash, password_visible, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM room WHERE room_code = #{roomCode} AND status IN (0, 2)

SELECT
FROM room WHERE expire_time < #{currentTime} AND status = 0 ORDER BY expire_time ASC LIMIT 100

SELECT
FROM room WHERE status = 2 AND expire_time < #{thresholdTime} ORDER BY expire_time ASC LIMIT 100

SELECT
FROM room WHERE status = 1 AND closed_time IS NOT NULL AND closed_time < #{thresholdTime} ORDER BY closed_time ASC LIMIT 100

SELECT
FROM room WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND status IN (0, 2) ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE room SET current_members = current_members + 1, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND current_members < max_members
UPDATE room SET current_members = current_members - 1, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND current_members > 0
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT r.room_id) FROM room r INNER JOIN room_member rm ON r.room_id = rm.room_id AND rm.user_id = #{userId} AND rm.leave_time IS NULL
AND r.status = #{status}
AND r.status IN (0, 1, 2)
AND r.status = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE room SET status = #{status}, closed_time = #{closedTime}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND status IN (0, 2)
UPDATE room SET password_visible = #{passwordVisible}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
UPDATE room SET status = #{status}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
UPDATE room SET expire_time = #{expireTime}, status = #{status}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND status IN (0, 2)
